title: Python sim auth.py: WebSocket token in query string may be logged
description: In python/src/lichen/sim/auth.py, WebSocket connections pass the token as a query parameter (?token=<token>). Query parameters can appear in server access logs, proxy logs, and browser history. While the constant-time comparison is good, consider documenting this logging risk or supporting a first-message auth protocol for WebSockets as an alternative.
